## ScreenShotPP v0.2.1

A small fix on top of v0.2.0.

### Fixes

- The update banner in Settings no longer stays visible permanently. It now
  appears only when a newer (non-skipped) version is actually available, and the
  banner has been restyled to match the rest of the app.
